news.t: The Best Inverse ETFs of the 2020 Bear Market
3 ETFs for Contrarians to Play a Summer Fade

holdings.infoBox: DOG is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Short Dow30 (DOG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Dow Jones Industrial Average index. The fund provides inverse exposure to the price-weighted Dow Jones Industrial Average, which includes 30 of the largest US companies. DOG was launched on Jun 19, 2006 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: The Best Inverse ETFs of the 2020 Bear Market
data.text: The best inverse ETFs of the 2020 bear market were RWM, DOG, and HDGE.

data.title: 3 ETFs for Contrarians to Play a Summer Fade
data.text: Will the best June for the stock market in decades give way to selling in July? Trade a fade using these three inverse index ETFs.
